recommendations.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
recommendations.overview: A girl, sent by her parents to live with her two eccentric aunts, finds out on her sixteenth birthday that she is a witch.

recommendations.title: Bunks
recommendations.overview: When two trouble-making brothers scam their way into an idyllic summer camp, they find themselves leading a rag tag cabin of boys into breaking every rule in the book.

recommendations.title: I, Madman
recommendations.overview: A bookshop clerk starts seeing the disfigured killer from her favorite 1950s pulp novels come to life and start killing people around her.

recommendations.title: Blowback
recommendations.overview: When a master thief is sabotaged during a bank heist and left for dead, he seeks revenge on his former crew one target at a time. Now, with the cops and the mob closing in, he's in the race of his life to reclaim an untold fortune in cryptocurrency f

recommendations.title: The Gate

recommendations.title: Spiders
recommendations.overview: After a Soviet space station crashes into a New York City subway tunnel, a species of venomous spiders is discovered, and soon they mutate to gigantic proportions and wreak havoc on the city.

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
recommendations.overview: Siblings Lucy, Edmund, Susan and Peter step through a magical wardrobe and find the land of Narnia. There, they discover a charming, once peaceful kingdom that has been plunged into eternal winter by the evil White Witch, Jadis. Aided by the wise and

recommendations.title: The Good Witch
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes in to town and inhabits the local haunted mansion, making everyone wonder if she's a witch or "The Grey Lady".

recommendations.title: Return to Halloweentown
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, Comedy, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: As Halloweentown prepares to celebrate its 1,000th anniversary, Marnie Piper and her brother Dylan return to Witch University, where trouble is in session from the Sinister Sisters and from someone who's plotting to use Marnie's powers for evil.
